ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager of the club */,
  "club_logo" TEXT /* URL to the club's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the club's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URL to the club's social media profile */,
  "fans" INTEGER /* Number of fans or followers */,
  "total_titles" INTEGER /* Total number of titles won by the club */,
  "total_championships" INTEGER /* Total number of championships won by the club */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the club in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the manager started managing the club */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the manager ended managing the club */,
  "previous_clubs" TEXT /* List of previous clubs managed */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements or titles won */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches managed */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of matches won */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of matches drawn */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of matches lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "total_clubs" INTEGER /* Total number of clubs participating in the season */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer in the season */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* Name of the top assister in the season */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "club_seasons" (
  "club_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club's performance in a season */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won */,
  "games_drawn" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the club in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals scored - goals conceded) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the club in the season */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer for the club in the season */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* Name of the top assister for the club in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_seasons_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_club_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is currently playing for */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "value" REAL /* Current market value of the player in millions of the local currency */,
  "injuries_count" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries the player has had */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance in a season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total shots on target */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Total dribbles completed */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match is played in */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "home_team_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_report" TEXT /* Summary of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring from */,
  "to_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee in millions of the local currency */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan (if applicable) */,
  "transfer_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the player was injured */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, ligament tear) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current recovery status (e.g., in progress, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (city, country) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the platform (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
